entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the fifth most cultivated crop worldwide

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, which is a constraint in sorghum

entities.name: PEST
entities.description: Biological constraints affecting sorghum popularity and production

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Non-biological factors limiting sorghum production

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: The geographical areas where better sorghum production is crucial

entities.name: PHOSPHOLIPASE A (PLA) FAMILY
entities.description: A family of genes in sorghum characterized in this study

entities.name: PLA GENES
entities.description: Specific genes within the PLA family, 32 identified in the sorghum genome

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to analyze chromosomal localization, molecular weight, isoelectric point, and subcellular distribution

entities.name: CHROMOSOMAL LOCALIZATION
entities.description: The position of genes on the chromosomes

entities.name: MOLECULAR WEIGHT
entities.description: A physical property of the PLA proteins

entities.name: ISOELECTRIC POINT
entities.description: The pH at which a molecule carries no net electrical charge

entities.name: SUBCELLULAR DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The location of the proteins within the cell

entities.name: PATATIN-RELATED PHOSPHOLIPASE A (PPLA)
entities.description: A subgroup of the PLA-like family genes

entities.name: PHOSPHOLIPASE A1 (PLA1)
entities.description: A subgroup of the PLA-like family genes

entities.name: PHOSPHOLIPASE A2 (PLA2)
entities.description: A subgroup of the PLA-like family genes

entities.name: IN-SILICO CHROMOSOME LOCALIZATION STUDIES
entities.description: Computational studies to determine gene distribution on chromosomes

entities.name: CIS-MOTIF ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of promoter regions to identify regulatory elements

entities.name: PROMOTER REGIONS
entities.description: DNA sequences that regulate the expression of PLA genes

entities.name: EXPRESSION STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis of gene expression patterns across different tissues

entities.name: TISSUES
entities.description: Plant parts including leaf, root, seedling, mature seed, immature seed, anther, and pollen

entities.name: METABOLIC PROCESSES
entities.description: Chemical processes in the cell involving PLA genes

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The development of the plant, influenced by PLA genes

entities.name: DEFENCE
entities.description: The plant's ability to protect itself, influenced by PLA genes

entities.name: STRESS RESPONSE
entities.description: The plant's reaction to adverse conditions, influenced by PLA genes
